mapper.select:
SELECT tp.id, tp.user_id AS memberId, up.name AS memberName, tp.product_id AS productId, tp.quantity, tp.price_krw AS priceKrw, tp.payment_method AS paymentMethod, tp.description, DATE(tp.created_at) AS purchaseDate, tp.created_at AS createdAt FROM ticket_purchases tp LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON tp.user_id = up.user_id
ORDER BY tp.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT product_id AS productId, COUNT(*) AS purchaseCount, SUM(quantity) AS totalQty, SUM(price_krw) AS totalRevenue, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS ym FROM ticket_purchases WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY product_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY ym DESC, product_id
